title: Acer Aspire E 15 ES1-512-C88M 15.6-Inch Laptop (Diamond Black)

I have been using Acer products since the 90's and some have been better than others but this is the first absolute piece of junk we have gotten with the Acer name on it. It feels and looks cheap. Within a few months of owning it, it had to be restored to get it to work without freezing up. I have restored it every month or so for a year to get it to work properly. After the preliminary set up (naming the computer, small little stuff like that), I had adware and malware within 15 minutes. Our computer tech did a remote set-up within the hour which removed what had already infected the computer - brought in by McAfee, according to them. They installed security software and all seemed well for about a week. Understand this is not a computer we're gaming on - j
wont_power_on: I purchase this laptop in December and by June the capacitor went out on it, now it won't turn on at all. Even when it did run it was slow and programs would unexpectedly quit. I'm just hoping that the one year warranty covers this, otherwise I'm out on the $$ I paid for it.

Three weeks after buying this the power button lost its "click" and wouldn't turn on the computer.  Returning wasn't an option because we moved out of the country. It's a heavy laptop.  Can't recommend this particular one.

Graphics processor isn't bad. Lacks heavily in processing power though, but honestly you should only be looking at this laptop if you do simple things such as email. The trackpad is glitchy, I'm not a Windows genius so maybe it's something the OS is doing, but it keeps clicking and dragging when I click once.

After some use, I would not recommend buying this computer. I recently bought
battery_failure: This computer's battery stopped holding a charge after about two months and it runs pretty slowly.  Luckily I got the warranty with it and will be returning it.

I've had this computer for less than a year and already the battery has stopped charging.  The computer will turn off immediately if it's not plugged in.  It's super slow - I can't even watch a movie without it freezing and glitching constantly, even with nothing else running and nothing extra downloaded onto it.  This computer is pretty useless aside from light web browsing.
physical_breakage: This is my second Acer Aspire in a year and I am about to purchase another one.  The computer itself is great for the value but it is so delicate. My first one was sitting on top of my school bag and slid off. hinge_failure: It's a great, strong laptop except for the fact that after a few months, the flimsy screen almost broke off completely. I'll have to buy another more expensive laptop with a stronger screen.
wont_boot: I am underwhelmed by this product.  Although the price was good and I did not expect a Cadillac I do expect basic functions to work. The Acer Aspire E15 is by far the worst piece of junk I've ever wasted money on. I bought it with a factory install of Windows 10, within a month I had the "black screen of death" and wound up re-installing Windows. Now 2 months later the black screen is back and I can't get anywhere with it this time. The USB ports have only worked sporadically anyways and trying to boot from a USB drive
keyboard_failure: This could possibly be one of my worst Amazon purchases. I bought it as a 3rd computer for my small business.... faced issues from day 1.  Mainly the trackpad has issues (as many other reviewers have pointed out) and some of the keys get stuck... in particularly the F key... one moment we are working on a graphic designs project, the next the darn thing deletes our work because a key get stuck.<br

I bought mine from NewEgg on eBay in Dec 2014, so they're a trusted seller. UPDATE 3/2016: I originally left a 5-star review but this thing has been nothing but trouble since a few weeks after I bought it.

charging_port_failure: Excellent product for leads and for comfortable and light office , quality hardware is not mu superior but in relation to price is very advantageous , have a deficiency with the battery and a design problem with that particular mine in particular failure unless one year of use and refuses to load
this laptop is only 2 months old and has already stopped charging. will not buy acer products again.
storage_failure: I bought two of these. They work fine for about two years and then the hard drives fail.
